/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chromack.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chromack.dir/chromack_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chromack.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chromack.dir/src/ChromackControl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chromack.dir/src/ChromackConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chromack.dir/src/ChromackPanel.cpp.o -o chromack  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libLayerShellQtInterface.so.6.6.4 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
